common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.banned: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.

start.choose_language:
Welcome to {app}! 🚗
Please choose your language:
start.welcome_driver:
Hi {name}! 👋

Share your live location and I'll find parking spots near you.

Use the menu below to get started.

nearby.ask_location: 📍 Tap the button below to share your location, and I'll find nearby parking.
nearby.none_found: No available parking found within {radius} km. Try moving the search area or check back later.
nearby.results_header_far: No spots within {radius} km, but here are the closest ones (nearest is {distance} away):

booking.choose_start: When do you want to start parking?
booking.confirm_pending_note: Payment will be added in the next step. For now this just reserves the spot.
booking.conflict_full: Sorry, this spot just got fully booked for that time. Please pick another spot or time.
booking.spot_unavailable: This spot is no longer available. Please choose another.

help.text:
{app} helps you find and book parking in Addis Ababa.

• 🅿️ Find parking — share your location to see nearby spots
• 📋 My bookings — see your reservations
• 🏠 List your spot — earn money renting your parking
• 🌐 Language — switch between English and Amharic

Need help? Contact support.

checkin.driver_notified: ✅ You've been checked in at {address}. Enjoy your parking!
checkin.not_completable: This booking can't be completed (already closed or not checked in).
checkin.err_not_found: This code is invalid or has expired.
checkin.err_not_owner: Only the spot's owner can check this booking in.
checkin.err_already: This booking is already checked in.
checkin.err_invalid_state: This booking is cancelled or already completed.
